creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The 'grant group' (who can set a flag value) for the exp-run flag is currently portmgr (the bugzilla group). 

This will be changed to the 'freebsd_committer' group, enabling any developer the ability to improve the accuracy of issue metadata.

A bonus of this is reducing the need to maintain up-to-date group membership (keeping portmgr@ membership and freebsd_portmgr bugzilla group in sync)
